name: ponytail-audit
tagline: Whole-repo over-engineering scan that ranks deletable, stdlib-replaceable, or simplifiable code without applying any changes.
verdict: Tight, read-only audit skill: clear tag taxonomy, a precise ranked output template, and explicit scope boundaries (correctness/security/perf routed elsewhere). Minor gaps: the output line format has no worked example, and there is no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Bespoke output notation given only as a placeholder template, no filled worked example line.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
